mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_pre_placement_exam WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_pre_placement_exam WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM tb_pre_placement_exam WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM tb_pre_placement_exam WHERE exam_id = #{examId} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM tb_pre_placement_exam WHERE employee_id = #{employeeId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_pre_placement_exam WHERE employee_id = #{employeeId} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM tb_pre_placement_exam WHERE exam_year = #{examYear} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_pre_placement_exam WHERE exam_year = #{examYear} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM tb_pre_placement_exam WHERE status = #{status} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_pre_placement_exam WHERE status = #{status} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM tb_pre_placement_exam WHERE employee_name LIKE '%' + #{name} + '%' AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_pre_placement_exam WHERE employee_name LIKE '%' + #{name} + '%' AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_pre_placement_exam WHERE exam_id LIKE #{prefix} + '%'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_pre_placement_exam ( exam_id, employee_id, employee_name, employee_dept, employee_email, work_place_id, exam_date, exam_year, target_job, hazardous_factors, hospital, exam_result, result_detail, restriction_detail, follow_up_required, follow_up_date, status, notes, author_name, author_email, author_dept, deleted, created_at, modified_at ) VALUES ( #{examId}, #{employeeId}, #{employeeName}, #{employeeDept}, #{employeeEmail}, #{workPlaceId}, #{examDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{examYear}, #{targetJob}, #{hazardousFactors}, #{hospital}, #{examResult}, #{resultDetail}, #{restrictionDetail}, #{followUpRequired}, #{followUpDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{status}, #{notes}, #{authorName}, #{authorEmail}, #{authorDept}, #{deleted}, GETDATE(), GETDATE() )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_pre_placement_exam SET employee_id = #{employeeId}, employee_name = #{employeeName}, employee_dept = #{employeeDept}, employee_email = #{employeeEmail}, work_place_id = #{workPlaceId}, exam_date = #{examDate,jdbcType=DATE}, exam_year = #{examYear}, target_job = #{targetJob}, hazardous_factors = #{hazardousFactors}, hospital = #{hospital}, exam_result = #{examResult}, result_detail = #{resultDetail}, restriction_detail = #{restrictionDetail}, follow_up_required = #{followUpRequired}, follow_up_date = #{followUpDate,jdbcType=DATE}, status = #{status}, notes = #{notes}, author_name = #{authorName}, author_email = #{authorEmail}, author_dept = #{authorDept}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_pre_placement_exam SET deleted = 1, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
